title: All for Mary
writer: Harold Brooke, Kay Bannerman, Peter Blackmore
actors: Nigel Patrick, Kathleen Harrison, David Tomlinson
plot: In a Swiss Alpine resort shortly after the War an army officer and upper-class Humpy Miller both set their sights on Mary, the landlord's daughter. After the two come down with chicken pox, they are put in the charge of fellow gue...
